entries.sentence: They spent their honeymoon in Greece.
entries.chinese: honeymoon = 蜜月；他们在希腊度蜜月。

entries.sentence: He wore a blue hoodie to school.
entries.chinese: hoodie = 连帽衫；他穿着一件蓝色连帽衫去学校。

entries.sentence: The housewife planned meals for the week.
entries.chinese: housewife = 家庭主妇；这位家庭主妇计划了一周的饭菜。

entries.sentence: She gave her brother a big hug.
entries.chinese: hug = 拥抱；她给了弟弟一个大大的拥抱。

entries.sentence: The film has a lot of gentle humor.
entries.chinese: humor = 幽默；这部电影有许多温和的幽默。

entries.sentence: Hunger made the children quiet.
entries.chinese: hunger = 饥饿；饥饿让孩子们安静下来。

entries.sentence: We were in a hurry after breakfast.
entries.chinese: hurry = 匆忙；早饭后我们很匆忙。

entries.sentence: The old hut stood near the forest.
entries.chinese: hut = 小屋；旧小屋在森林附近。

entries.sentence: There was ice on the road this morning.
entries.chinese: ice = 冰；今天早上路上有冰。

entries.sentence: She put on her ice skates at the rink.
entries.chinese: ice skates = 冰鞋；她在溜冰场穿上冰鞋。

entries.sentence: Show your ID at the entrance.
entries.chinese: ID = 身份证件；在入口处出示你的身份证件。

entries.sentence: That is a good idea for the project.
entries.chinese: idea = 想法；这是这个项目的一个好想法。

entries.sentence: The shelf is one inch too wide.
entries.chinese: inch = 英寸；这个架子宽了一英寸。

entries.sentence: Sugar is the main ingredient in this cake.
entries.chinese: ingredient = 原料；糖是这个蛋糕的主要原料。

entries.sentence: Write your initial at the top of the page.
entries.chinese: initial = 首字母；把你的首字母写在页面顶部。

entries.sentence: The printer needs black ink.
entries.chinese: ink = 墨水；打印机需要黑色墨水。

entries.sentence: The office answered my inquiry by email.
entries.chinese: inquiry = 询问；办公室通过电子邮件回答了我的询问。

entries.sentence: The ski instructor helped the beginners.
entries.chinese: instructor = 教练；滑雪教练帮助了初学者。

entries.sentence: She showed interest in photography.
entries.chinese: interest = 兴趣；她表现出对摄影的兴趣。

entries.sentence: We bought drinks during the interval.
entries.chinese: interval = 中场休息；我们在中场休息时买了饮料。

entries.sentence: The interviewer asked about my experience.
entries.chinese: interviewer = 面试官；面试官询问了我的经验。

entries.sentence: The inventor showed us a new machine.
entries.chinese: inventor = 发明家；发明家向我们展示了一台新机器。

entries.sentence: The iron was too hot for the shirt.
entries.chinese: iron = 熨斗；熨斗对这件衬衫来说太烫了。

entries.sentence: I finished the ironing before dinner.
entries.chinese: ironing = 熨衣服；我晚饭前熨完了衣服。

entries.sentence: The latest issue of the magazine is out.
entries.chinese: issue = 期号；这本杂志的最新一期出版了。

entries.sentence: Choose one item from the menu.
entries.chinese: item = 项目；从菜单中选择一项。

entries.sentence: The thief spent a night in jail.
entries.chinese: jail = 监狱；小偷在监狱里待了一晚。

entries.sentence: Open the jar of strawberry jam.
entries.chinese: jar = 罐子；打开那罐草莓酱。

entries.sentence: Jazz was playing in the cafe.
entries.chinese: jazz = 爵士乐；咖啡馆里播放着爵士乐。

entries.sentence: A jet flew high above the clouds.
entries.chinese: jet = 喷气式飞机；一架喷气式飞机在云层上方高飞。

entries.sentence: She keeps her jewellery in a small box.
entries.chinese: jewellery = 珠宝；她把珠宝放在一个小盒子里。

entries.sentence: Jogging before breakfast wakes me up.
entries.chinese: jogging = 慢跑；早饭前慢跑让我清醒。

entries.sentence: His joke made everyone laugh.
entries.chinese: joke = 笑话；他的笑话让大家都笑了。

entries.sentence: The judge listened to both teams.
entries.chinese: judge = 裁判；裁判听取了两队的意见。

entries.sentence: Pour the milk into the jug.
entries.chinese: jug = 壶；把牛奶倒进壶里。

entries.sentence: The horse made a high jump.
entries.chinese: jump = 跳跃；那匹马做了一个高跳。

entries.sentence: She wore a warm jumper in class.
entries.chinese: jumper = 套头毛衣；她在课堂上穿了一件暖和的套头毛衣。

entries.sentence: The jungle was full of strange sounds.
entries.chinese: jungle = 丛林；丛林里充满了奇怪的声音。

entries.sentence: A kangaroo crossed the road slowly.
entries.chinese: kangaroo = 袋鼠；一只袋鼠慢慢穿过马路。

entries.sentence: The zoo keeper fed the lions.
entries.chinese: keeper = 饲养员；动物园饲养员喂了狮子。

entries.sentence: His kick sent the ball into the goal.
entries.chinese: kick = 踢；他的一脚把球送进了球门。

entries.sentence: The kid carried a red backpack.
entries.chinese: kid = 孩子；那个孩子背着一个红色背包。

entries.sentence: This bag weighs one kilogramme.
entries.chinese: kilogramme = 千克；这个袋子重一千克。

entries.sentence: She gave the baby a kiss.
entries.chinese: kiss = 吻；她亲了宝宝一下。

entries.sentence: The first-aid kit is in the kitchen.
entries.chinese: kit = 工具包；急救包在厨房里。

entries.sentence: The kite flew over the beach.
entries.chinese: kite = 风筝；风筝在海滩上空飞翔。

entries.sentence: The kitten slept in a basket.
entries.chinese: kitten = 小猫；小猫睡在篮子里。

entries.sentence: Her knowledge of history is excellent.
entries.chinese: knowledge = 知识；她的历史知识非常出色。

entries.sentence: Read the label before you wash the shirt.
entries.chinese: label = 标签；洗衬衫前阅读标签。

entries.sentence: The students worked in the science laboratory.
entries.chinese: laboratory = 实验室；学生们在科学实验室工作。
